state_snapshot.overall_goal: Integrate openNURBS 8.x into Alice Viewer 2 for DOD-optimized .3dm mesh translation and stabilize the CI/CD infrastructure for cross-platform reliability.
state_snapshot.active_constraints: - **Build/Tooling**: LLVM clang-cl, Ninja, C++17, Static Runtime (/MT). No MSVC `cl.exe`. Use relative paths in `vcpkg-configuration.json` for CI portability. - **Coding**: STRICT Allman style; Data-Oriented Design (DOD); Branchless logic; Zero heap allocations in hot loops (use `Alice::LinearArena`). - **Performance**: Ban heavy headers (``, ``) and STL containers (`std::vector`) in performance-critical paths. - **Architecture**: Single-header `RhinoIO.h` with a "Quarantine Boundary" guarded by `ALICE_RHINO_IMPLEMENTATION`. Boundary is currently frozen to protect integration. - **Interaction**: Orbit (`ALT+LMB`), Pan (`MMB`), Zoom (`ALT+RMB`). Respect `ImGui::GetIO().WantCaptureMouse`. - **Aesthetics**: Background `0.9`. Geometry in Deep Charcoal (`#2D2D2D`). Window Title: `"ALICE CAD ON FRAMEWORK"`. - **OpenGL**: Version 400. Use `GL_RGBA16F` for G-Buffers. No `::` prefix for GL functions.
state_snapshot.key_knowledge: - **openNURBS Port**: Version `8.24.25281.15003`. Archive Hash: `E115F2...CFD51D2C`. - **vcpkg Baselines**: Default: `a9f0cd03...`; Registry: `7a73df26...`. - **CI Portability**: Registry repository set to `./vcpkg-overlay-ports` in `vcpkg-configuration.json` to enable GitHub Actions resolution. - **Linker Dependencies**: Requires `shlwapi.lib` and `zlib.lib` for openNURBS static linkage on Windows. - **Git Policy**: `vcpkg_installed/` and `build/` are untracked and ignored via `.gitignore` (approx. 500MB+ repository size reduction). - **Vcpkg Resolution**: Relative path `./vcpkg-overlay-ports` in `vcpkg-configuration.json` requires absolute resolution for local Windows/vcpkg builds but is maintained for GitHub Actions portability.
state_snapshot.artifact_trail: - `.gitignore`: Configured to ignore all build artifacts and local environment configs (`build_env_config.json`). - `vcpkg-configuration.json`: Path to local registry updated to relative `./vcpkg-overlay-ports`. - `src/AliceViewer.cpp`: Updated `glfwCreateWindow` title string to `"ALICE CAD ON FRAMEWORK"`. - `include/RhinoIO.h`: Refactored to STB-style single-header; `src/RhinoIO.cpp` deleted to consolidate logic. - `src/sketch.cpp`: Manages `ON::Begin()` and `ON::End()` lifecycle for openNURBS testing.
state_snapshot.file_system_state: - CWD: `C:\Users\shajay.b\Documents\REPOS\alice-viewer - openNurbs` - BUILD: Local Ninja/clang-cl build verified SUCCESSFUL (0 errors). - IGNORED: `build/`, `vcpkg_installed/`, `.vs/`, `build_env_config.json`.
state_snapshot.recent_actions: - Removed accidental tracking of `vcpkg_installed/` and `build/` from the Git index. - Fixed CI/CD failure by migrating `vcpkg-configuration.json` to relative pathing. - Rebranded the application window title in `src/AliceViewer.cpp`. - Re-validated the entire build pipeline with the updated configuration. - Generated final state snapshot for task handoff.
state_snapshot.task_state: 1. [DONE] Setup vcpkg git registry for openNURBS 8.x. 2. [DONE] Implement ONX_Model mesh translation and single-header refactor. 3. [DONE] Fix CI/CD portability and repository bloat. 4. [DONE] Update UI window branding. 5. [IN PROGRESS] Verify mesh extraction with a valid .3dm file. <-- CURRENT FOCUS 6. [TODO] Add support for Curve (ON_Curve) and Point (ON_PointCloud) translation.
